rsgl 0.1.0
  • Get started

    • Example Gallery
    • SGL Language Guide

rsgl Implementation Plan

Source: rsgl-plan.md

Goal

Convert the sglref reference implementation (at /Users/jochapjo/sgl_projects/sglref/) into a CRAN-ready open source R package named rsgl, living in the /Users/jochapjo/sgl_projects/rsgl/ git repository (remote: sgl-projects/rsgl).

The sglref repo is READ-ONLY — it must never be modified. All work happens in the rsgl repo.

Phase 1: Copy Source Files into rsgl

Copy files from sglref into rsgl, excluding items that belong only to the research project.

Files to copy

DESCRIPTION
NAMESPACE
LICENSE
LICENSE.md
.Rbuildignore
.gitignore
README.Rmd
R/                    (entire directory — all .R files)
src/                  (entire directory — all .c, .cpp, .h files, Makevars)
tests/                (entire directory — testthat.R, testthat/ with all tests and _snaps)
man/                  (entire directory)
.github/              (entire directory)

Files/directories to NOT copy

Item Reason
src/test/ C unit tests using Criterion framework — not part of the R package
src/scanner.l Flex source — pre-generated scanner.c is already included
src/parser.y Bison source — pre-generated parser.tab.c is already included
makefile Dev-only makefile for regenerating parser/scanner
README.md Will be regenerated from README.Rmd

Commands

cd /Users/jochapjo/sgl_projects/rsgl

# Copy directory structure
cp -r ../sglref/R .
cp -r ../sglref/src .
cp -r ../sglref/tests .
cp -r ../sglref/man .
cp -r ../sglref/.github .

# Copy top-level files
cp ../sglref/DESCRIPTION .
cp ../sglref/NAMESPACE .
cp ../sglref/LICENSE .
cp ../sglref/LICENSE.md .
cp ../sglref/.Rbuildignore .
cp ../sglref/.gitignore .
cp ../sglref/README.Rmd .

# Remove items that should not be in rsgl
rm -rf src/test
rm -f src/scanner.l
rm -f src/parser.y

Phase 2: Rename Package (sglref → rsgl)

Systematic rename of the package name across all files. Every occurrence of sglref must become rsgl.

2.1 DESCRIPTION

  • Change Package: sglref → Package: rsgl

  • Change Title: to something like An Implementation of the SGL Graphics Language

    • CRAN rule: title must be in Title Case, must not redundantly start with package name or “A package for…”

  • Change Description: to a proper paragraph (at least one sentence):

    Parses and executes SGL (Structured Graphics Language) statements against
'DuckDB' databases to produce 'ggplot2' visualizations. SGL is a declarative
language for generating statistical graphics from relational data. See
Chapman (2025) <doi:10.48550/arXiv.2505.14690> for the language specification.

  • Fix typo: "packagee" → "package" (in the description text above this won’t be present, but verify)

  • Change URL: to https://github.com/sgl-projects/rsgl

  • Change BugReports: to https://github.com/sgl-projects/rsgl/issues

  • Fix inconsistent indentation (sglref mixes tabs and spaces) — use spaces only

  • Consider updating version to 0.1.0 (first public release)

2.2 NAMESPACE

Change:

useDynLib(sglref, .registration = TRUE)

to:

useDynLib(rsgl, .registration = TRUE)

Note: The NAMESPACE is generated by roxygen2, so this change must come from updating the source roxygen comments and re-running roxygen2::roxygenise(). But since we may not have R available, we can update both the source comment and the generated NAMESPACE directly.

2.3 R/sglref-package.R → R/rsgl-package.R

  • Rename the file

  • Change @useDynLib sglref → @useDynLib rsgl

  • File content should be:

    ## usethis namespace: start
#' @importFrom Rcpp sourceCpp
## usethis namespace: end
NULL

## usethis namespace: start
#' @useDynLib rsgl, .registration = TRUE
## usethis namespace: end
NULL

2.4 R/RcppExports.R

Change:

.Call(`_sglref_sgl_to_rgs`, sgl_stmt)

to:

.Call(`_rsgl_sgl_to_rgs`, sgl_stmt)

2.5 src/RcppExports.cpp

Three changes: 1. Function name: _sglref_sgl_to_rgs → _rsgl_sgl_to_rgs (appears 3 times) 2. Registration function: R_init_sglref → R_init_rsgl

2.6 tests/testthat.R

Change:

library(sglref)
test_check("sglref")

to:

library(rsgl)
test_check("rsgl")

2.7 Verify no other references

Search all files for the string sglref and update any remaining occurrences:

grep -r "sglref" --include="*.R" --include="*.Rd" --include="*.cpp" --include="*.c" --include="*.h" --include="*.Rmd" --include="*.yaml" --include="*.yml" .

Phase 3: CRAN Compliance Fixes

3.1 Makevars cleanup

The current src/Makevars links LAPACK/BLAS/FLIBS, which are unnecessary for a text parser. Update to:

PKG_CFLAGS = $(SHLIB_OPENMP_CFLAGS)
PKG_CXXFLAGS = $(SHLIB_OPENMP_CXXFLAGS)

OBJECTS = RcppExports.o sgl_to_rgs.o parser.tab.o scanner.o aes.o geom.o cta.o qual.o scale.o keyword.o

all: $(SHLIB)

parser.tab.o: parser.tab.c parser.tab.h
scanner.o: scanner.c parser.tab.h

Actually, since SGL doesn’t use OpenMP either, simplify further:

OBJECTS = RcppExports.o sgl_to_rgs.o parser.tab.o scanner.o aes.o geom.o cta.o qual.o scale.o keyword.o

all: $(SHLIB)

parser.tab.o: parser.tab.c parser.tab.h
scanner.o: scanner.c parser.tab.h

3.2 Makevars.win

Create src/Makevars.win for Windows portability:

OBJECTS = RcppExports.o sgl_to_rgs.o parser.tab.o scanner.o aes.o geom.o cta.o qual.o scale.o keyword.o

all: $(SHLIB)

parser.tab.o: parser.tab.c parser.tab.h
scanner.o: scanner.c parser.tab.h

3.3 flex_overrides.h review

The file redefines exit(), stdout, and stderr to prevent the flex-generated scanner from calling system exit or writing to stdout/stderr (which is forbidden in R packages). These overrides are necessary and appropriate. CRAN may flag them in a NOTE but they are standard practice for packages embedding flex/bison output. No change needed but be aware.

3.4 .Rbuildignore updates

Update to remove references to files we didn’t copy, and add any new exclusions:

^LICENSE\.md$
^README\.Rmd$
^\.github$
^doc$
^Meta$
^\.claude$
^rsgl-plan\.md$

Removed entries for makefile, src/test, src/scanner.l, src/parser.y since those files don’t exist in rsgl.

3.5 Compiler warnings

The flex/bison generated code may produce compiler warnings (e.g., unused functions like yyunput, input). These are common and can be suppressed if needed. If R CMD check produces WARNINGs about them, add to Makevars:

PKG_CFLAGS = -Wno-unused-function

Only add this if warnings appear during testing.

3.6 CRAN DESCRIPTION requirements

Ensure: - Authors@R uses proper ORCID if available - Description field is at least one complete sentence, ending with a period - Software names in Description are single-quoted (‘DuckDB’, ‘ggplot2’) - URLs/DOIs are properly formatted - No trailing whitespace or mixed indentation

Phase 4: Documentation

4.1 Package-level documentation

Add a R/rsgl-package.R section with @description for the package itself, or add a separate R/rsgl-doc.R:

#' rsgl: An Implementation of the SGL Graphics Language
#'
#' Parses and executes SGL (Structured Graphics Language) statements against
#' DuckDB databases to produce ggplot2 visualizations. SGL is a declarative
#' language for generating statistical graphics from relational data.
#'
#' @seealso [dbGetPlot()] for the main user-facing function.
#'
#' @keywords internal
"_PACKAGE"

This enables ?rsgl to work.

4.2 dbGetPlot documentation

The existing roxygen documentation in R/dbGetPlot.R is adequate. Verify: - @param for both parameters exists (yes) - @return describes the return value (yes) - @examples has a runnable example (yes) - @export is present (yes)

4.3 Internal function documentation

All non-exported functions (which is everything except dbGetPlot) do not strictly need roxygen documentation for CRAN. However, ensure none are accidentally exported.

4.4 README.Rmd

Rewrite for rsgl: - Update package name references - Update badge URLs to sgl-projects/rsgl - Add installation instructions (e.g., remotes::install_github("sgl-projects/rsgl")) - Keep the usage example (update library(sglref) → library(rsgl)) - Reference the SGL paper

Note: README.md will be generated from README.Rmd by running devtools::build_readme(). If we can’t run R, write README.md directly to match what README.Rmd would produce.

4.5 man/dbGetPlot.Rd

This is auto-generated by roxygen2. After renaming, ensure it references rsgl not sglref. If running roxygen2 isn’t possible, update manually.

Phase 5: Testing Adaptation

5.1 Test file updates

The test files in tests/testthat/ reference the package via test_con (from setup.R) and call internal functions directly. Since testthat loads the package namespace, internal functions are accessible without sglref:: prefix. Search for any explicit sglref:: references and update to rsgl::.

5.2 Snapshot tests

The tests/testthat/_snaps/ directory contains SVG snapshots for visual regression tests using vdiffr. These should work as-is since they compare plot output, not package names.

5.3 Test verification

After all changes, run:

devtools::test()

All tests should pass. If any fail due to the rename, fix accordingly.

Phase 6: CI/CD

6.1 R-CMD-check workflow

Update .github/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml: - The workflow itself doesn’t reference sglref by name — it uses generic r-lib/actions. Should work as-is. - Verify the badge URL in README points to the correct repo.

6.2 Lint workflow

Update .github/workflows/lint.yaml: - Same — should work as-is since it uses lintr::lint_package() generically.

6.3 Verify CI passes

After pushing the initial commit, verify that GitHub Actions pass on all platforms (macOS, Windows, Ubuntu with multiple R versions).

Phase 7: Final Verification

7.1 R CMD check

Run the full CRAN check:

R CMD build .
R CMD check --as-cran rsgl_*.tar.gz

Target: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 notes (1 NOTE about “new submission” is acceptable).

7.2 Checklist

Execution Order Summary

Step Phase Description
1 Phase 1 Copy sglref files into rsgl (excluding dev-only files)
2 Phase 2 Rename sglref → rsgl in all files
3 Phase 3 Fix CRAN compliance issues (Makevars, DESCRIPTION, .Rbuildignore)
4 Phase 4 Update documentation (README, roxygen, package docs)
5 Phase 5 Verify tests work with the new package name
6 Phase 6 Update CI/CD configuration
7 Phase 7 Run R CMD check, fix any remaining issues

Key Risks and Mitigations

Risk Mitigation
Rcpp symbol naming breaks after rename Carefully update all _sglref_ → _rsgl_ in RcppExports.cpp, RcppExports.R, and NAMESPACE
Flex/bison generated code produces compiler warnings Suppress with -Wno-unused-function in Makevars if needed
Windows compilation fails (no Makevars.win) Create Makevars.win with same content as Makevars
CRAN NOTE about LAPACK/BLAS linkage Remove unnecessary $(LAPACK_LIBS) $(BLAS_LIBS) $(FLIBS) from Makevars
Visual snapshot tests fail on different platforms Accept that vdiffr tests may need platform-specific snapshots
CRAN NOTE about exit() redefinition in flex_overrides.h This is standard practice; document in cran-comments.md if submitting

Files Modified (Complete List)

File Action Changes
DESCRIPTION Edit Package name, title, description, URLs, fix typo, indentation
NAMESPACE Edit useDynLib(rsgl, ...)
R/sglref-package.R Rename + Edit → R/rsgl-package.R, update @useDynLib
R/RcppExports.R Edit _sglref_ → _rsgl_
src/RcppExports.cpp Edit _sglref_ → _rsgl_, R_init_sglref → R_init_rsgl
src/Makevars Edit Remove LAPACK/BLAS linkage
src/Makevars.win Create Windows build support
.Rbuildignore Edit Remove entries for files we didn’t copy
.gitignore Edit Minor updates if needed
README.Rmd Rewrite Update for rsgl branding
README.md Rewrite Generated from README.Rmd or written directly
tests/testthat.R Edit library(rsgl), test_check("rsgl")
man/dbGetPlot.Rd Edit Update any sglref references
R/rsgl-package.R Create/Edit Add "_PACKAGE" documentation

On this page

Developed by Jon Chapman.
